name: Romanov Premium Vodka
description: Romanov Premium Vodka is a smooth and approachable spirit crafted for everyday enjoyment. Clean and crisp with a balanced finish, it works perfectly in classic cocktails or served chilled for a straightforward vodka experience.

name: Roochenko Pure Russian Vodka
description: Roochenko Pure Russian Vodka is a traditional-style vodka inspired by Russian distillation methods. Smooth and neutral with a clear finish, it is ideal for shots, simple mixers, and classic vodka-based cocktails.

name: Short Story Triple Distilled Grain Vodka
description: Short Story Triple Distilled Grain Vodka is crafted from select grains and distilled three times for enhanced purity. Light-bodied and smooth with a clean finish, it is perfect for refreshing cocktails or neat pours.

name: SKYY Vodka
description: SKYY Vodka is an American vodka known for its clean and crisp profile. Smooth with subtle grain notes and a refined finish, it blends effortlessly into cocktails or can be enjoyed chilled for a classic serve.

name: Smirnoff Vodka No. 21
description: Smirnoff Vodka No. 21 is a triple distilled and ten-times filtered spirit renowned for its clarity and smoothness. Neutral and versatile, it is ideal for a wide range of cocktails or enjoyed straight over ice.

name: Smirnoff Green Apple Vodka
description: Smirnoff Green Apple Vodka is a crisp, fruit-infused spirit blending triple distilled vodka with the fresh tartness of green apples. Smooth and lightly sweet with a refreshing finish, it is perfect for chilled shots or vibrant cocktails.

name: Smirnoff Minty Jamun Vodka
description: Smirnoff Minty Jamun Vodka is a bold flavored vodka combining the juicy richness of jamun with a cool hint of mint. Crafted in India, it delivers a unique sweet-tangy taste with a refreshing twist, ideal for creative cocktails.

name: Smirnoff Mirchi Mango Vodka
description: Smirnoff Mirchi Mango Vodka blends tropical mango sweetness with a spicy chili kick for a vibrant flavor experience. Triple distilled and smooth, it offers a bold balance of heat and fruitiness, perfect for adventurous cocktails.

name: Smirnoff Orange Vodka
description: Smirnoff Orange Vodka is a citrus-infused spirit combining triple distilled vodka with bright, zesty orange flavors. Smooth and refreshing with a crisp finish, it works beautifully in classic mixed drinks and fruity cocktails.

name: Smirnoff Zesty Lime Vodka
description: Smirnoff Zesty Lime Vodka delivers a lively burst of lime flavor layered over smooth triple distilled vodka. Tangy, crisp, and refreshing, it is perfect for mixing with soda, tonic, or crafting citrus-forward cocktails.

name: Smoke Lab Aniseed Vodka
description: Smoke Lab Aniseed Vodka is a premium 5x distilled spirit infused with bold aniseed flavors. Smooth yet aromatic, it delivers a distinctive herbal sweetness balanced by a clean finish, making it ideal for refined cocktails or sipping chilled.

name: Smoke Lab Green Chilli Mango Vodka
description: Smoke Lab Green Chilli Mango Vodka is a vibrant flavored spirit combining juicy mango sweetness with a fiery green chilli kick. 5x distilled and imported, it offers a bold fusion of tropical fruit and spice, perfect for adventurous cocktails.

name: Smoke Lab Saffron Flavored Vodka
description: Smoke Lab Saffron Vodka is a luxurious 5x distilled flavored vodka infused with rich saffron notes. Smooth and aromatic, it delivers a warm, subtly sweet character with a refined finish, ideal for premium cocktails or elegant sipping.

name: Solo Gold Vodka
description: Solo Gold Vodka is a premium clear spirit presented in an elegant gold-accented bottle. Crafted for smoothness and clarity, it offers a clean, crisp taste with a refined finish, making it suitable for classic cocktails or neat pours.

name: Sound Vodka Caramel
description: Sound Vodka Caramel is a cold distilled spirit infused with rich caramel extract. Smooth and slightly sweet with warm toffee notes, it delivers a mellow finish that pairs beautifully with dessert-style cocktails or served over ice.

name: Sound Vodka Citrus
description: Sound Vodka Citrus is a 36% ABV spirit distilled with lemon, oranges and grapefruit for a bright, refreshing profile. Crisp and zesty with balanced citrus notes, it delivers a clean finish that works beautifully in fresh cocktails or served chilled.

name: Sound Vodka Coffee Liqueur
description: Sound Vodka Coffee Liqueur is infused with 100% Arabica coffee, offering deep roasted aromas and smooth, slightly sweet notes. With a rich and mellow character, it is perfect for espresso martinis, dessert cocktails or served over ice.

name: Sound Vodka Original
description: Sound Vodka Original is filtered through bamboo charcoal to achieve exceptional smoothness and clarity. Bottled at 40% ABV, it delivers a clean, crisp taste with a refined finish, ideal for classic cocktails or neat pours.

name: Stoli Cucumber Vodka
description: Stoli Cucumber Vodka is a refreshing flavored vodka infused with natural cucumber essence. Light, crisp and subtly herbal, it provides a clean and cooling finish that pairs perfectly with tonic, soda or fresh summer cocktails.

name: Stoli Original Vodka
description: Stoli Original Vodka is a premium spirit crafted for unmatched smoothness and balance. Distilled to deliver clarity and a clean profile, it offers subtle grain character with a crisp finish, making it ideal for timeless cocktails or straight pours.

name: Stoli Salted Caramel Vodka
description: Stoli Salted Caramel Vodka is a rich and indulgent flavored vodka blending smooth caramel sweetness with a delicate touch of sea salt. Creamy and well-balanced, it offers dessert-like warmth and a silky finish, perfect for sipping, shots, or decadent cocktails.

name: Tigerfire Premium Artisan Vodka
description: Tigerfire Premium Artisan Vodka is a bold and refined spirit crafted with precision for exceptional smoothness and character. Clean and balanced with a subtle warmth, it delivers a crisp finish suitable for classic cocktails or refined straight pours.

name: Tito's Handmade Vodka
description: Tito's Handmade Vodka is an award-winning American vodka crafted in old-fashioned pot stills. Exceptionally smooth with a clean, neutral profile, it offers a soft finish that makes it ideal for cocktails or enjoying neat over ice.

name: Uluvka Vodka
description: Uluvka Vodka is a premium Polish spirit presented in an elegant sculpted bottle. Distilled for purity and balance, it delivers a smooth mouthfeel with subtle grain notes and a refined, clean finish suited for upscale cocktails or sophisticated sipping.

name: Vodkoff Original Premium Vodka
description: Vodkoff Original Premium Vodka is a fine distilled spirit offering a classic clean taste and smooth character. Crisp and well-rounded, it provides a balanced finish that works well in everyday cocktails or served chilled.

name: Zig Zag Green Apple Vodka
description: Zig Zag Green Apple Vodka is a vibrant flavored spirit infused with the crisp and tangy taste of fresh green apples. Smooth and refreshing with a lightly sweet finish, it delivers a lively fruity kick that works perfectly in chilled shots or energetic cocktails.

name: Zig Zag Original Vodka
description: Zig Zag Original Vodka is a clean and smooth spirit crafted for a balanced and versatile drinking experience. With a crisp profile and refined finish, it is ideal for classic mixed drinks, party cocktails or serving neat and well chilled.

name: Seagram's Imperial Blue
description: Seagram's Imperial Blue is a smooth Indian blended grain whisky crafted from hand-picked grains and blended with select Scotch malts. It offers a balanced profile with light caramel sweetness, subtle oak notes, and a clean, easy finish, making it a popular choice for everyday enjoyment.

name: McDowell's No.1 Original
description: McDowell's No.1 Original is a widely recognized Indian blended grain whisky crafted from select Indian grain spirits and matured malts. It offers a smooth, approachable profile with light caramel sweetness, subtle oak notes, and a clean finish, making it a popular everyday choice.

name: McDowell's No.1 Luxury
description: McDowell's No.1 Luxury is a light and smooth Indian blended whisky known for its balanced character. Carefully blended to deliver gentle malt sweetness, mild spice, and a soft finish, it is crafted for easy drinking and consistent quality.

name: Royal Challenge
description: Royal Challenge is a premium Indian blended whisky aged in American oak casks. It delivers a richer profile with notes of oak, light spice, and smooth malt sweetness, offering a refined and well-rounded drinking experience.

name: Royal Stag
description: Royal Stag is a popular Indian blended whisky crafted from Indian grain spirits and select imported Scotch malts. Known for its smooth character, it features light woody notes, mild sweetness, and an easy finish suitable for regular consumption.

name: Oaksmith International
description: Oaksmith International is a premium blended whisky combining aged Scotch malts with fine grain spirits. It presents a smooth and slightly smoky profile with gentle oak, vanilla sweetness, and a clean, refined finish.

name: Oaksmith Gold
description: Oaksmith Gold is an international blended whisky crafted from aged Scotch malts and American bourbon whiskies, refined with Japanese craftsmanship. It offers a rich, smooth profile with notes of honey, toasted oak, vanilla, and a warm, lingering finish.

name: Signature Rare Aged Whisky
description: Signature Rare Aged Whisky is a premium Indian blended whisky known for its deep and rich character. Carefully matured and blended, it delivers smooth malt sweetness, subtle spice, light oak notes, and a balanced, refined finish.

name: Seagram's Blenders Pride Reserve Collection
description: Seagram's Blenders Pride Reserve Collection is a refined Indian blended whisky crafted with imported Scotch malts and select Indian grain spirits. It offers a smooth and elegant profile with hints of vanilla, light oak, and a clean, mellow finish.

name: Seagram's Blenders Pride Rare Premium Whisky
description: Seagram's Blenders Pride Rare Premium Whisky is a smooth and sophisticated blend of imported Scotch malts and fine Indian grain spirits. It presents a balanced flavor profile with soft malt sweetness, mild spice, and a silky finish.

name: Royal Green Deluxe Blended Whisky
description: Royal Green Deluxe Blended Whisky is a smooth Indian blend made with imported Scotch malts and select Indian grain spirits. It offers a light, easy-drinking profile with gentle sweetness, subtle oak character, and a clean, crisp finish.

name: Royal Stag Barrel Select
description: Royal Stag Barrel Select is a refined Indian blended whisky matured in oak barrels for enhanced smoothness. It offers a richer character with notes of toasted oak, light caramel sweetness, subtle spice, and a warm, balanced finish.

name: Ignite Reserve Premium Blend
description: Ignite Reserve Premium Blend is a bold Indian blended whisky crafted for a smooth yet expressive taste. It delivers notes of malt sweetness, gentle spice, and light oak with a clean, warming finish.

name: High Roller Mature Malt Whiskey
description: High Roller Mature Malt Whiskey is a rich and characterful blend crafted for a smooth drinking experience. It features notes of malted barley, subtle vanilla, light oak influence, and a well-rounded finish.

name: Royal Challenge American Pride Gold Blend
description: Royal Challenge American Pride Gold Blend is a smooth blended whisky matured with American oak influence. It offers hints of caramel, toasted oak, mild spice, and a balanced, mellow finish.

name: Stanley Luxury Whisky
description: Stanley Luxury Whisky is a traditionally blended Indian whisky crafted for a rich and smooth character. It presents light grain sweetness, gentle oak notes, and a soft, easy finish suitable for regular enjoyment.

name: Oaken Glow Premium Blended Whisky
description: Oaken Glow Premium Blended Whisky is an oak-infused blend crafted for a smooth and rounded character. It offers warm notes of toasted oak, light caramel sweetness, subtle spice, and a mellow finish.

name: Iconiq Spice
description: Iconiq Spice is a bold Indian blended whisky infused with natural spices and matured in oak casks. It delivers rich spice notes, gentle sweetness, and a smooth, warming finish.

name: Iconiq White
description: Iconiq White is a smooth international grain whisky matured in bourbon casks. It presents a clean profile with hints of vanilla, light oak, and soft grain sweetness.

name: Rockford Reserve Fine & Rare
description: Rockford Reserve Fine & Rare is a refined Indian blended whisky crafted for a rich and smooth experience. It offers balanced oak notes, mild sweetness, and a warm, lingering finish.

name: Rockford Classic
description: Rockford Classic is a smooth blended whisky known for its rich amber color and balanced flavor. It features gentle oak influence, light malt sweetness, and a clean finish.

name: Antiquity Blue
description: Antiquity Blue is a premium Indian blended whisky crafted with select malts and fine grain spirits. It offers a smooth profile with notes of honey, light spice, and subtle oak.

name: Cooper's Cut Blended Reserve
description: Cooper's Cut Blended Reserve is a carefully crafted blend featuring aged malt and grain spirits. It delivers a rounded character with hints of vanilla, oak, and soft spice.

name: Godwit Rare Premium Whisky
description: Godwit Rare Premium Whisky is a smooth and refined Indian blend inspired by Scotch traditions. It offers balanced grain sweetness, gentle oak notes, and a clean, crisp finish.

name: Vat 69
description: Vat 69 is a classic blended Scotch whisky known for its smooth and approachable character. It features light malt sweetness, subtle smoke, and a balanced, easy-drinking finish.

name: William Lawson's Blended Scotch Whisky
description: William Lawson's Blended Scotch Whisky is a smooth and fruity Scotch blend with soft cereal notes and a hint of oak. It delivers a gentle sweetness and a clean finish.

name: Teacher's Highland Cream
description: Teacher's Highland Cream is a renowned blended Scotch whisky rich in peated malt character. It offers a fuller flavor profile with subtle smoke, malt sweetness, and a smooth, lingering finish.

name: Dewar's White Label
description: Dewar's White Label is a classic blended Scotch whisky known for its smooth and approachable character. Double aged for extra refinement, it offers notes of honey, vanilla, soft oak, and a clean, balanced finish.

name: Black & White Blended Scotch Whisky
description: Black & White is a light and smooth blended Scotch whisky featuring gentle malt sweetness and subtle peat undertones. It delivers a crisp, easy-drinking profile with a soft, mellow finish.

name: 100 Pipers Deluxe
description: 100 Pipers Deluxe is a smooth blended Scotch whisky crafted with select Speyside malts. It offers balanced notes of fruit, malt sweetness, gentle smoke, and a warm, lingering finish.

name: Black Dog Black Reserve
description: Black Dog Black Reserve is a rich blended Scotch whisky matured in oak casks. It presents notes of caramel, toasted oak, light spice, and a smooth, full-bodied finish.

name: Black Dog Gold Reserve
description: Black Dog Gold Reserve is a refined blended Scotch whisky offering a smoother and slightly sweeter profile. It features hints of vanilla, dried fruits, gentle oak, and a rounded finish.

name: Paul John Nirvana
description: Paul John Nirvana is an Indian unpeated single malt whisky crafted in Goa. It offers smooth notes of honey, caramel, light fruit, and subtle oak with a gentle, easy-drinking finish.

name: Teacher's 50
description: Teacher's 50 is a smooth blended Scotch whisky crafted to commemorate the brand’s heritage. It features a rich malt character, mild peat smoke, balanced sweetness, and a warm finish.

name: Teacher's Golden Thistle 12 Years
description: Teacher's Golden Thistle 12 Years is a double-matured blended Scotch whisky aged for 12 years. It offers refined notes of honey, oak, light smoke, and dried fruits with a smooth, lingering finish.

name: Singhasan Blended Whisky
description: Singhasan is an Indian blended whisky crafted using malt whisky and select grain spirits. It delivers a smooth profile with mild spice, caramel sweetness, and balanced oak notes.

name: Whistler Barrel Aged
description: Whistler Barrel Aged is a blended malt whisky matured in oak barrels for added depth. It offers warm notes of toasted wood, vanilla, subtle spice, and a rich, rounded finish.

name: MaQintosh Silver Edition
description: MaQintosh Silver Edition is a smooth Indian blended whisky crafted with select malt and grain spirits. It presents gentle sweetness, light oak influence, and a clean, easy-drinking finish.

name: Bharatpur 8 Years
description: Bharatpur 8 Years is an Indian whisky matured in oak barrels for eight years. Crafted with a royal heritage inspiration, it offers warm caramel notes, subtle spice, gentle oak influence, and a smooth, well-rounded finish.

name: Royal Jaguar 12 Years Oloroso Cask Finish
description: Royal Jaguar 12 Years is a refined blended Scotch whisky finished in Oloroso sherry casks. It delivers rich notes of dried fruits, toasted nuts, oak spice, and a smooth, lingering finish with subtle sweetness.

name: De Paul 8 Double Malt Reserve
description: De Paul 8 Double Malt Reserve is an oak-aged Indian malt whisky offering a rich and balanced character. It features notes of caramel, toasted oak, light spice, and a smooth, elegant finish.

name: Peter Scot Black Single Malt
description: Peter Scot Black Single Malt is crafted from malted barley and matured in oak casks. It offers a smooth profile with hints of vanilla, light fruit, gentle oak, and a clean, refined finish.

name: Udaipur Reserve Whiskey
description: Udaipur Reserve Whiskey is a premium blend crafted with matured Indian malts and imported Scotch malts. It presents a smooth body with mild sweetness, soft oak, and a balanced finish.

name: Other Side Oloroso Finish
description: Other Side Oloroso Finish is a smooth Indian blended whisky finished in Oloroso casks. It delivers notes of dried fruits, subtle spice, soft oak, and a warm, rounded finish.

name: Phulwari Indian Malt Whisky
description: Phulwari Indian Malt Whisky is crafted from malted barley and matured in oak barrels. It offers light sweetness, hints of grain, soft spice, and a smooth, approachable finish.

name: Scottish Leader Original
description: Scottish Leader Original is a classic blended Scotch whisky combining selected malt and grain whiskies. It offers smooth malt sweetness, light smoke, gentle oak, and a balanced finish.

name: Hundred Kings Indian Single Malt
description: Hundred Kings Indian Single Malt is a premium malt whisky matured in oak casks. It features rich caramel notes, mild spice, toasted oak, and a smooth, luxurious finish.

name: Varchas Indus Gold
description: Varchas Indus Gold is a small-batch blended whisky crafted in the Indian subcontinent. It presents balanced sweetness, soft oak tones, and a smooth, rounded character.

name: Yello Designer Whisky
description: Yello Designer Whisky is a contemporary blended whisky combining fine Scotch and Indian malts. It offers a smooth, slightly sweet profile with gentle oak notes and an easy-drinking finish.

name: Glen Forest Single Malt Scotch Whisky
description: Glen Forest Single Malt Scotch Whisky is a product of Scotland crafted from malted barley and matured in oak casks. It offers a rich, smooth, and refined character with notes of honey, light fruit, gentle spice, and a balanced finish.

name: Oaksmith Nagomi
description: Oaksmith Nagomi is an international blended whisky combining carefully selected Scotch malts with premium grain spirits. It delivers a smooth and rounded profile with subtle oak, mild smokiness, and a refined, mellow finish.

name: Fireball Cinnamon Flavoured Whisky
description: Fireball Cinnamon Flavoured Whisky is a bold and spicy whisky infused with intense cinnamon flavors. It offers a sweet heat profile with warming spice and a smooth, fiery finish, ideal for shots and cocktails.

name: Kedrick Rye Malt Whiskey
description: Kedrick Rye Malt Whiskey is crafted from American corn, spiced rye, and rich malted barley. It features a bold yet smooth profile with notes of spice, caramel sweetness, toasted oak, and a warm, lingering finish.

name: Woodburns Contemporary Indian Whiskey
description: Woodburns Contemporary Indian Whiskey is a modern Indian blend matured in oak barrels. It presents a smooth and approachable character with hints of vanilla, toasted wood, mild spice, and a balanced finish.

name: Glen Victory Blended Scotch Whisky
description: Glen Victory Blended Scotch Whisky is distilled and matured in Scotland using selected malt and grain whiskies. It offers a smooth and light-bodied profile with gentle sweetness, soft oak notes, and a clean finish.

name: Clynelish 14 Years Single Malt Scotch Whisky
description: Clynelish 14 Years is a Highland single malt Scotch whisky matured for fourteen years in oak casks. It delivers a complex profile with waxy sweetness, citrus notes, light maritime character, and a long, elegant finish.

name: Kinmilt Special Reserve Whisky
description: Kinmilt Special Reserve Whisky is a premium blended whisky crafted for a smooth and refined experience. It features subtle floral notes, gentle vanilla sweetness, light spice, and a warm, rounded finish.

name: Bushmills The Original Irish Whiskey
description: Bushmills The Original is a triple-distilled Irish whiskey known for its smooth and mellow character. It combines light grain whiskey with malt whiskey matured in bourbon casks, offering notes of honey, vanilla, and fresh fruit.

name: Glenfield Blended Scotch Whisky
description: Glenfield Blended Scotch Whisky is distilled, blended, and bottled in Scotland. It delivers a smooth and balanced profile with light malt sweetness, soft oak tones, and a gentle, easy-drinking finish.

name: West Cork Triple Distilled Irish Whiskey
description: West Cork Triple Distilled Irish Whiskey is matured in first-fill bourbon casks and crafted in Ireland. It offers a smooth, clean character with notes of vanilla, orchard fruits, gentle spice, and a soft, lingering finish.

name: Jameson Irish Whiskey
description: Jameson Irish Whiskey is a smooth triple-distilled Irish blend crafted from pot still and fine grain whiskeys. It offers balanced notes of vanilla, toasted wood, light spice, and a mellow, clean finish.

name: Jameson Stout Edition
description: Jameson Stout Edition is triple distilled and finished in craft beer barrels, delivering subtle notes of cocoa, coffee, and creamy malt. It combines the smoothness of Jameson with a rich stout-inspired character.

name: Jameson Black Barrel
description: Jameson Black Barrel is matured in double-charred bourbon barrels, offering intensified flavors of vanilla, caramel, toasted oak, and spice with a rich, smooth finish.

name: Justerini & Brooks Rare
description: Justerini & Brooks Rare is a classic blended Scotch whisky crafted from selected malt and grain whiskies. It delivers a smooth profile with gentle malt sweetness, light smoke, and a balanced finish.

name: Johnnie Walker Red Label
description: Johnnie Walker Red Label is a vibrant blended Scotch whisky known for its bold character. It offers lively spice, hints of smoke, and fresh fruit notes, making it ideal for mixing.

name: Johnnie Walker Black Label 12 Years
description: Johnnie Walker Black Label 12 Years is a rich and smooth blended Scotch matured for a minimum of 12 years. It presents deep notes of dark fruit, vanilla, gentle smoke, and a long, balanced finish.

name: Johnnie Walker Double Black
description: Johnnie Walker Double Black is an intensely smoky blended Scotch whisky with rich peat influence. It delivers bold flavors of charred oak, dried fruits, spice, and a lingering smoky finish.

name: Johnnie Walker Gold Label Reserve
description: Johnnie Walker Gold Label Reserve is a luxurious blended Scotch whisky offering creamy honey sweetness, soft fruit notes, subtle smoke, and a smooth, elegant finish.

name: Johnnie Walker 18 Years
description: Johnnie Walker 18 Years is a masterfully blended Scotch whisky matured for at least eighteen years. It offers rich layers of dried fruit, dark chocolate, smooth vanilla, and refined smoke.

name: Woodford Reserve Distiller's Select
description: Woodford Reserve Distiller's Select is a Kentucky straight bourbon crafted with a high-corn mash bill and matured in charred oak barrels. It features notes of dried fruit, vanilla, toasted oak, and warm spice.

name: Monkey Shoulder The Original
description: Monkey Shoulder The Original is a blended malt Scotch whisky crafted from select Speyside single malts. It offers smooth vanilla sweetness, citrus zest, malt richness, and a creamy, approachable finish.

name: Monkey Shoulder Smokey Monkey
description: Monkey Shoulder Smokey Monkey is a blended malt Scotch whisky crafted with a rich peat influence. It delivers bold smoky notes balanced with sweet vanilla, toasted oak, and subtle spice, creating a smooth yet intensely smoky character.

name: Ballantine's Finest
description: Ballantine's Finest is a classic blended Scotch whisky known for its smooth and balanced profile. It offers notes of honey sweetness, soft vanilla, light floral hints, and a gentle touch of smoke with a clean finish.

name: Ballantine's 7 Years American Barrel
description: Ballantine's 7 Years American Barrel is aged in American oak barrels, delivering a richer and slightly sweeter profile. It features notes of caramel, vanilla, ripe orchard fruits, and subtle spice with a smooth, rounded finish.
